commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=e4ec0be0b0f49f8d8715ab54c1836ae440e14dfc)
commands.review_summary:
The PR scopes menu Refresh and Command-R to the visible provider, keeps merged Overview refresh global, removes animated refresh-row feedback, adjusts menu prewarming/token-refresh lifecycles, and adds focused regression tests.

Reproducibility: yes. for the PR-introduced bug: source inspection shows Overview can be visually enabled while `startManualRefresh(for: nil)` rejects the action whenever any provider is already refreshing. The original beachball/stutter improvement still lacks high-confidence live reproduction proof on current main or the PR head.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs author/maintainer action for the Overview no-op fix, latest-head real behavior proof, and acceptance of the scoped Refresh compatibility change; automation cannot provide the contributorâ€™s runtime proof.

target.title: perf(menu): fix open-menu beachball/stutter on multi-provider setups
target.body:
## Summary

- Scope manual Refresh actions to the visible provider; merged Overview remains an all-provider refresh.
- Route Command-R through the same menu scope as mouse activation.
- Keep the Refresh row static and dimmed while work is in flight, avoiding an animated spinner inside the vibrant menu.
- Mark Refresh busy across every menu scope while the singleton manual task is in flight, suppressing duplicate actions.
- Prevent delayed closed-menu prewarming while any other menu is tracking.
- Retry deferred closed-menu prewarming when menu tracking or manual refresh ends.
- Treat scoped provider and token work as active menu data refreshes.
- Drain scheduled token-cost work before a forced scoped pass only when that same provider is in flight; cancellation clears its throttle state.
- Reconcile scoped Codex usage and credits after dashboard login is required.

This replaces the stale diagnostic/WIP branch with a narrow current-main implementation. The old instrumentation, custom settle queue, card-reuse architecture, and test harnesses are intentionally excluded because current main already owns those concerns through menu-session invalidation, recyclable hosting views, and live card monitoring.

## Exact-head verification

- Exact head `e4ec0be082e1a0a10a8d95c857aa86070b343f5a`, rebased onto `d3551e73`.
- `StatusMenuClosedPreparationTests|StatusMenuPersistentRefreshTests|StatusMenuScopedCodexRefreshTests|UsageStoreManualTokenRefreshTests`: 40/40 passed.
- `make test`: all 41 groups / 491 selections green.
- `make check`: green; 0 formatting changes and 0 lint violations.
- Final context-aware branch autoreview: clean (0.82).
- Ad-hoc package and CLI config validation: green.

Regression coverage includes separate-provider mouse and Command-R refresh scope, merged Overview/global behavior, merged selected-provider scope, global singleton-task busy state, unrelated-provider refresh isolation, same-provider forced token-work draining and throttle cleanup, cross-menu/manual-refresh delayed-prewarm retries, and Codex reconciliation after dashboard login expires.

Co-authored with @jangisaac-dev.
target.author: jangisaac-dev
